config.name: pgqa_100m_gate
config.description: R7 mainline: P-GQA full-dim hybrid vs transformer at 100M. The last hybrid test before kill rule. Success: >=+0.05 BPT, kurtosis<=2.1, max_act<=52, no fused-RMS collapse.
